rows.label: qev030604_MSG0001
rows.name:
Aah! We're missing this, we're missing that...
It's troubling trying to hold a Bias-style wedding here
when we're lacking so many things, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0002
rows.name:
Good grief... at a time like this, the men
start chugging booze before the ceremony even begins...
I really wish I had a cat's paw to help me! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hmm? Are you...
Could you be [ST:playername ],
the one who brought those two together!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thank you, na! It's all thanks to you
that my little brother Nemard got such a wonderful bride
like Heptana! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_SEL0011
rows.name: State that it was indeed due to your efforts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_SEL0021
rows.name: State that it was the result of Nemard's kindness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0005
rows.name:
You gave that indecisive boy
the best possible choice. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0006
rows.name:
Well... it's a complete mystery to me
why Heptana said OK, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0007
rows.name:
Heh heh, it makes me happy to hear you say that, na.
Among the strength-obsessed Bias,
no one praises you just for being kind. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Ah, that's right, na!
You help out with the wedding preparations too! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0009
rows.name:
We need hard hump meat to use for the wedding meat, na,
but everyone is drunk, so there's no one I can ask. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0010
rows.name:
By the time you come back with the meat,
I'll have the preparations on this end finished! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ne? Please?
I want to celebrate my cute little brother's wedding
with the best meat. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0012
rows.name:
A Bias wedding is meat! Meat! Meat!
It's a meat-meat paradise, na!
Anyway, we need lots of meat and booze. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0013
rows.name:
Among that, the hard hump meat
serves as the two's wedding meat,
the main dish, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0014
rows.name:
Please go get some fresh ones.
I'm counting on you, savior of my little brother! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Ah, [ST:playername ]!
Listen to this for a second, na.
Everyone is so mean. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0016
rows.name:
Just because my little brother beat me to it,
the people in the clan are calling me
an old maid, an old maid! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0017
rows.name:
Tch... Someday I'm going to find a wonderful darling
who can take down a Mandos in a single blow, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_JNK0030
rows.name: Comfort[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_SEL0031
rows.name: Comfort Duna.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_JNK0040
rows.name: Point out[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell her you brought what she asked for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0018
rows.name:
You're kind, na...
If only there was a Bias as kind as you
who was also incredibly strong, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0019
rows.name:
But there isn't anyone like that anywhere.
Mom tells me not to aim too high, but
I don't want to marry some weird guy. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Wait, huh... come to think of it,
I feel like I asked you for something,
but what was it again, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Wait, what was it, na?
Did you need something from me? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Ah! That's right!
Sorry, now I remember, I had you
go get the wedding meat for me. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, the old folks
started getting drunk,
so we moved the ceremony forward and started early. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0024
rows.name:
Thank you, na.
With this, we can finally begin the oath ceremony... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Oh! So you're [ST:playername ]!
For an Earthling, you seem quite capable! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0026
rows.name:
I am Galba Vassago!
The greatest warrior in Tormein,
whose name echoed across countless battlefields, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0027
rows.name:
Fwahahahahaha!
Alien species may celebrate weddings with song and dance,
but we Bias are a people of battle! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0028
rows.name:
Let us celebrate their new beginning with a flashy brawl.
Now! Have a bout with me, da!
Let's go at it until we drop! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Galba is completely drunk, na.
He hasn't fought in a while since coming here,
so he must be frustrated, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well, don't worry about the old man.
Let's start the oath ceremony with this meat quickly. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_SEL0051
rows.name:
Follow Duna's advice and avoid
the match with Galba.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_SEL0061
rows.name:
Accept the match
proposed by Galba.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0031
rows.name:
You bastard!! And you call yourself a warrior!?
Fight me! In the past, I used to
cut down those Cavern Clan bastards one after another... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0032
rows.name:
...The old man's long story has started, na.
When he gets like this, it takes a long time. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0033
rows.name:
We can't even start the ceremony like this.
I'm sorry, but could you fight him a little
and shut Galba up, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0034
rows.name:
That's right! Fight me!
Show me the combat skills that let you survive
being surrounded by 30 Cavern Clan members in that battle, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0035
rows.name:
Fwahahahaha! I'll be waiting in the northeast plain
of Sayram Lake in the Primordial Wilderness, zo!
Don't run away, come to me! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0036
rows.name:
Oh!
You are a brave warrior,
no less than the Vassago who granted me my name! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0037
rows.name:
Fwahahahaha!
Show me the combat skills that let you survive
being surrounded by 30 Cavern Clan members in that battle, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0038
rows.name:
I'll be waiting in the northeast plain
of Sayram Lake in the Primordial Wilderness!
Let us unleash everything we have! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0039
rows.name:
Phew... He's a hopeless person, na.
I'm sorry, but quickly knock him out
and bring him back, please. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0044
rows.name:
Aah! We're missing this, we're missing that...
It's troubling trying to hold a Bias-style wedding here
when we're lacking so many things, na... [ST:wait ]

I really wish I had a cat's paw to help me! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0047

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0080

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0081

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0082
rows.name:
Phew... He's a hopeless person, na.
I'm sorry, but quickly knock him out
and bring him back, please. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0083
rows.name:
Even so, he used to be an amazing warrior in the past.
Even though he's a drunkard, it might be better
not to let your guard down, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0084
rows.name:
Do your best!
Defeat Galba quickly so we can begin the oath ceremony. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0085
rows.name:
Galba is back too,
so it's finally time for the oath ceremony to begin, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0086
rows.name:
Heh heh, Nemard seems nervous,
so it might be good if you went and talked to him a bit, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0100
rows.name:
My little brother Nemard rushed out,
saying he was going to make a horn ring, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0101
rows.name:
That boy isn't exactly good at hunting, but...
he does what needs to be done when it counts! I'm sure
he'll manage to get his hands on a splendid beast horn! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0102
rows.name:
One so splendid it'll surprise
even that fierce Heptana! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0103
rows.name:
My little brother Nemard rushed out,
saying he was going to make a horn ring, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0104
rows.name:
That boy isn't exactly good at hunting, but...
he does what needs to be done when it counts! I'm sure
he'll manage to get his hands on a splendid beast horn! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030604_MSG0105
rows.name:
One so splendid it'll make
even that emotional Enneana burst into tears! [ST:wait ]
